Home.heroSubtitle: An Authentic Guest House in the M'zab Valley
Home.welcomeText: Step into a beautifully lit riad, where time slows down and the warmth of the desert embraces you. Built with the timeless architecture of the M'zab Valley, our guest house offers a sanctuary of peace, tradition, and southern hospitality.
Home.royalSuiteText: Our most spacious offering with a private terrace overlooking the valley.
Home.traditionalRoomText: Authentic decor with modern comfort, centered around the courtyard.
Home.galleryTitle: Discover the atmosphere before you arrive.
Home.galleryText: Explore warm courtyards, quiet rooms, handmade details, local food, and guided experiences around Ghardaïa.

Footer.description: An authentic guest house in the M'zab Valley, designed around calm, tradition, local cuisine, and warm southern hospitality.
